name: Cabbage Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 small head of cabbage, shredded or chopped fine
1 large jar of favorite spaghetti sauce (or make your own)
1 cup rice (I used white, but brown would work too; you may need to add more water)
1 cup sliced mushrooms (other vegetables could be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a dry, nonstick skillet, fry the rice until it is lightly browned.
2. Place half of the cooked rice in the bottom of a large casserole dish.
3. Layer half of the shredded cabbage on top of the rice.
4. Mix 1 cup water with the spaghetti sauce and pour over the cabbage.
5. Spread half of the sliced mushrooms over this layer.
6. Repeat steps 2-5.
7. Bake for about an hour in a 350 degree oven.
